lines.target: Have you seen the sugar content of this soft drink? — He won’t be content with anything less than perfection.
Have you heard the new record by the Thugs? It’s terrible! A real flop.
Since they changed lead singers, they haven’t been able to record a decent album.
I’ve decided to go and spend a month in New York to perfect my English. What do you think?
Why bother? Your English is perfect as it is. Anyway, New York is so expensive.
When the headmaster left the school, the staff wanted to give him a suitable present.
They came to the realisation that it was necessary to upgrade the company image.
lines.base: Ellos se convencieron de que era necesario mejorar la imagen de la empresa.

lines.target: Yes, but the problem is that they’re too late. It took them five years to realise what a mess they were in.
lines.base: Sí, pero el problema es que se convencieron demasiado tarde. Les tomó cinco años para darse cuenta de la miseria en que estaban metidos.

lines.target: I sent off a load of photographs to a magazine in the hope that they would be published.
lines.base: Envié un montón de fotos a una revista con la esperanza de que fueran publicadas.

lines.target: But they have a permanent staff of twenty photographers, and photographic journalism is a cut-throat profession.
lines.base: Pero tienen un equipo permanente de veinte fotógrafos y el periodismo fotográfico es una profesión peligrosa.

lines.target: A new generation of workers is revolutionising the car industry — robots.
lines.base: Una nueva generación de trabajadores está en camino de revolucionar la industria automovilista: los robots.

lines.target: I’m sorry, I had no idea she was married.
lines.base: Lo siento, yo no sabía que ella estaba casada. — No se inquiete usted, su marido tampoco.

lines.target: He doesn’t possess the right qualities for a career in advertising. He’s not aggressive enough.
lines.base: Él no posee las cualidades necesarias para hacer carrera en la publicidad. No es lo suficiente agresivo.
